python--python-v2--draft.title: Python for Beginners
python--python-v2--draft.description: Begin with the first line of Python and grow one complete idea at a time. You will learn how programs display information, remember values, respond to input, make decisions, and repeat work. Each module ends with a connected build, and the final capstone combines the foundations into a clear, testable report program.

python-v2-0.title: Getting Started with Python
python-v2-0.description: Learn how Python reads a program, how values become output, and how error messages point back to the line that needs attention.
outcomes: Run Python code in a beginner-friendly environment
Explain how statements, expressions, and comments work
Use print output to observe program behavior
why: Running and reading tiny programs gives every later Python idea a concrete foundation.
You will leave this module able to observe what Python did instead of guessing what the code means.

python-v2-1.title: Variables, Input, and Strings
python-v2-1.description: Give programs memory and a voice by storing values, converting input, and shaping text for people to read.
outcomes: Build strings with common methods and f-strings
why: Variables and strings turn fixed demonstrations into programs that can respond to a real user.
Careful naming and formatting make later conditions, loops, and projects easier to reason about.

python-v2-2.title: Conditions and Logic
python-v2-2.description: Teach a program to choose one clear path by ordering conditions, combining boolean rules, and handling special cases first.
outcomes: Write if, elif, and else blocks
why: Most useful programs do not respond the same way to every situation.
Clear branch order prevents overlapping rules and makes the final decision understandable to both the learner and the grader.

python-v2-3.title: Loops and Iteration
python-v2-3.description: Repeat work safely with for and while loops, then control repetition with counters, accumulators, break, continue, and deliberate debugging.
outcomes: Use for loops and while loops
why: Loops let one small block of code process many values without copying the same statements.
Tracing loop state prepares you to build reliable summaries instead of accidental infinite loops.

python-v2-4.title: Mini Gradebook Capstone
python-v2-4.description: Combine input, loops, running totals, comparisons, and formatted output in one polished beginner capstone.
outcomes: Read a short sequence of inputs and summarize them in a report
Track totals, averages, and running maximums in a loop
Polish a beginner program into a final formatted result
why: A capstone reveals whether separate syntax skills can work together as one understandable program.
The final report gives you a concrete artifact you can run, test, explain, and improve.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-set.title: Setup and First Programs
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-set.description: Meet Python as a language that executes statements in order, then use print output, comments, and first errors to observe that process.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-val.title: Values and Expressions
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-val.description: Follow values through expressions and use the error type and line number as evidence when a program cannot finish.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-mod.title: Module Project
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-0-mod.description: Create a welcome board that grows from one reliable printed line into a small, polished first program.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-var.title: Variables and Assignment
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-var.description: Store information under clear names, accept typed input, and repair the common mistakes that confuse a variable with literal text.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-str.title: String Foundations
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-str.description: Navigate text by position, transform it with methods, and combine values into readable messages with f-strings.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-mod.title: Module Project
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-1-mod.description: Build a profile card whose data comes from variables and user input rather than hard-coded output.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-con.title: Conditional Basics
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-con.description: Read a condition as a question, understand its True or False result, and use indentation to show which statements belong to each path.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-com.title: Combining Conditions
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-com.description: Combine rules carefully, recognize empty values, and place exceptional cases before broad ranges.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-mod.title: Module Project
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-2-mod.description: Grow one study checker from a simple pass rule into an ordered decision system with clear special cases.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-for.title: For Loops
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-for.description: Use for loops to visit text and numeric ranges while counters and accumulators remember what the loop has discovered.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-whi.title: While Loops
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-whi.description: Repeat until a condition changes, stop deliberately with break, skip one iteration with continue, and debug the state that controls the loop.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-mod.title: Module Project
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-3-mod.description: Build a club check-in tracker that combines for, while, counters, break, and continue in one connected program.

python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-4-cap.title: Final Project
python--python-v2--draft-python-v2-4-cap.description: Finish a gradebook report that reads several scores, tracks totals and a maximum, and prints one deterministic summary.
